references.name: Keboto - Legacy of Constructivism Art Movement in Graphic Design
observedPatterns: Stark red/black/white color contrasts for maximum visual impact
Angular forms and sharp geometric compositions creating dynamic energy
Diagonal text placement for compositional movement and progress
adaptedElements: Zero border-radius throughout entire UI for sharp geometric feel
Diagonal accent stripes on stat cards and project banners

references.name: DesignModo - Diagonal Lines in Website Designs
observedPatterns: Diagonal section dividers guiding the user eye through content
CSS skewX transforms for creating angular visual elements
Triangular and angular shapes breaking up rectangular layouts
adaptedElements: Banner diagonal stripe using skewX(-20deg) transform
Card hover states with slight rotation and offset shadows
Decorative triangles and angled line overlays as background elements

references.name: CreativePro - Russian Constructivism and Graphic Design
observedPatterns: Typography as visual architecture with oversized condensed fonts
Functional design where every element serves both form and purpose
adaptedElements: Oswald condensed headings as poster-style visual anchors
Bebas Neue for decorative labels and section markers with letter-spacing
Layered banner composition with overlapping geometric shapes
